title: Meta
description: Provenance + identity for a contract envelope. Every contract carries a meta block.

baseline.description: Path to the baseline contract this was validated against, if any.

extractedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the data was extracted.

extractedBy.description: Who/what produced this. e.g. figma-mcp, design-system-sync/task-1, figma-to-html-architect/task-3.

nodeId.description: Figma node id if the contract was produced from a specific Figma node.
